title: We've Reached Peak Modern Audience Cope
description:
1348 Ex Voto has officially released and is flopping as many predicted. However, one unique thing coming out during this side arc is new cope I've never heard before and it's making for great entertainment. We'll also take a look into the business side of things a bit too, enjoy!
